Registry / Terms / metrological supervision

metrological supervision

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00178 · 9 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.3view ↗

control exercised in respect of the manufacture, import, installation, use, maintenance and repair of measuring instruments, performed in order to check that they are used correctly as regards the observance of metrology laws and regulations

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.3
    control exercised in respect of the manufacture, import, installation, use, maintenance and repair of measuring instruments, performed in order to check that they are used correctly as regards the observance of metrology laws and regulations

Suggested actions

  1. INFO ✓ This term IS in VIML 2022 (concept #2.03). Definition may differ from VIML 2000.
  2. MEDIUM 7 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 8 partially diverge.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102004OIML D 9:2004
#00187
2.5
control exercised in respect of the manufacture, import, installation, use, maintenance and repair of a measuring instrument and/or in respect of its use, performed in order to check that it is used correctly as regards the observance of metrology laws and regulations [VIML, 2.3]
partial
20102001OIML D 27:2001
#00178
2.16
control exercised in respect of the manufacture, import, installation, maintenance and repair of measuring instruments and/or in respect of their use, performed in order to check that they are used correctly as regards the observance of metrology laws and regulations [VIML 2.3]
partial
20101986OIML D 15:1986
#00266
2.9
procedures for control exercised in respect of the manufacture, installation and repair of measuring instruments, or in respect of their use, to check that they are used correctly and honestly. It extends also to control of correctness of the quantities indicated on prepacked articles [VML 2.6].
partial
202X2021OIML R060-1:2021
#03293
3.1.5
activity of legal metrological control to check the observance of metrology laws and regulations
partial
202X2012OIML D001:2012
#02211
3.1.11
activity of legal metrological control to check the observance of metrology laws and regulations [VIML 2.03]
partial
202X2011OIML D016:2011
#02258-D016
2.5
control exercised in respect of the manufacture, import, installation, use, maintenance and repair of measuring instruments, performed in order to check that they are used correctly as regards the observance of metrology laws and regulations [VIML 2.3]
ok

2.5
control exercised in respect of the manufacture, import, installation, use, maintenance and repair of a measuring instrument and/or in respect of its use, performed in order to check that it is used correctly as regards the observance of metrology laws and regulations [VIML 2.3]
partial

2.16
control exercised in respect of the manufacture, import, installation, use, maintenance and repair of a measuring instrument and/or in respect of its use, performed in order to check that it is used correctly as regards the observance of metrology laws and regulations [VIML, 2.3]

2.9
procedures for control exercised in respect of the manufacture, installation and repair of measuring instruments, or in respect of their use, to check that they are used correctly and honestly. It extends also to control of correctness of the quantities indicated on prepacked articles [VML 2.6].
